chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْجِيرَانِ لِأَهْلِ الْمُصِيبَةِ وَ اتِّخَاذِ الْمَأْتَمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 79 – What is Obligated upon the neighbour of the bereaved, and adopting the mourning

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/168)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/168)
text: وَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَصَمُّ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) مُرُوا أَهَالِيَكُمْ بِالْقَوْلِ الْحَسَنِ عِنْدَ مَوْتَاكُمْ فَإِنَّ فَاطِمَةَ ( سلام الله عليها ) لَمَّا قُبِضَ أَبُوهَا ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَسْعَدَتْهَا بَنَاتُ هَاشِمٍ فَقَالَتِ اتْرُكْنَ التَّعْدَادَ وَ عَلَيْكُنَّ بِالدُّعَاءِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Kufy, from Ibn Jamhour, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Al Mufazzal Bin Umar,
and Al Asam, from Hareyz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Instruct your family members with (speaking) the good words when someone from you dies, for Syeda Fatima<sup>asws</sup>, when her<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>saww</sup> passed away, the daughters of Hashim<sup>as</sup> supported her<sup>asws</sup>, so she<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Leave the supporting (eulogies) but you must pray (to Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ahmad ibn Muhammad al-Kufiy has narrated from ibn Jumhur from his father from Muhammad ibn Sinan from al-Mufaddal ibn ‘Umar who has said the following: “He has also said that al-Asamm has narrated to us from Hariz from Muhammad ibn Muslim from abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, who has said the following: ‘’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, “Instruct your families to speak good words when someone among you dies. When father of Fatimah, ‘Alayha al-Salam, died, daughters of children of Hashim supported her and she said to them, ‘Ignore eulogies but you must pray (to Allah).”””
